description_long: This object is a classic assault rifle with a robust metal receiver and barrel, complemented by wooden furniture on the stock, handguard, and pistol grip. The rifle features a fixed wooden stock and a curved detachable box magazine, typical of the AK-47 design. The metallic components have a matte, dark gray finish, while the wooden parts display a rich, brown grain pattern. Iron sights are mounted on the top of the barrel and receiver, providing basic aiming capability. The muzzle is simple, with no visible attachments such as a flash hider or suppressor. The overall construction suggests durability and functionality, suitable for use in urban environments.
description: A classic assault rifle with a dark metal body, wooden stock, and curved magazine, featuring iron sights and a robust, utilitarian design.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full profile, including the wooden stock, handguard, pistol grip, and curved magazine.
description_view_1: Front-on view highlighting the narrow barrel, iron front sight, and the alignment of the wooden stock and handguard.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the rifle's other profile, with clear visibility of the magazine, trigger, and wooden components.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the end of the wooden stock and the alignment of the barrel and receiver.
